message:
feat(fuzz): SysV IPC structure-aware harness (shm/msg/sem)

crates/frankenlibc-fuzz/fuzz_targets/fuzz_sysv_ipc.rs covers the small
SysV IPC family — shmget/shmat/shmdt/shmctl, msgget/msgsnd/msgrcv/msgctl,
semget/semop/semctl — with a 7-op archetype:

  - Full lifecycle on each family (create, op, IPC_RMID)
  - IPC_PRIVATE keys to avoid colliding with host IPC objects
  - IPC_NOWAIT on blocking ops so msgrcv/semop don't stall
  - Bad-id paths for shmctl/msgctl/semctl/shmat/shmdt
  - Bounded payload size (256 bytes msg, 4096 byte shm) for fast iter

Tolerates kernels with CONFIG_SYSVIPC=n by exercising the user-space
arg-validation surface even when the kernel rejects all create ops.

Verified via rch with CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_libc_cc_sysv:
5.5M runs at ~92K exec/s over 60s, no crashes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
